query_name:
WITH web_v1 AS
  (SELECT ws_item_sk item_sk,
          d_date,
          sum(sum(ws_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ws_item_sk
                                         ORDER BY d_date ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) cume_sales
   FROM 'web_sales.parquet' AS web_sales,
        'date_dim.parquet' AS date_dim
   WHERE ws_sold_date_sk=d_date_sk
     AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200+11
     AND ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL
   GROUP BY ws_item_sk,
            d_date),
store_v1 AS
  (SELECT ss_item_sk item_sk,
          d_date,
          sum(sum(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_item_sk
                                         ORDER BY d_date ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) cume_sales
   FROM 'store_sales.parquet' AS store_sales,
        'date_dim.parquet' AS date_dim
   WHERE ss_sold_date_sk=d_date_sk
     AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200+11
     AND ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL
   GROUP BY ss_item_sk,
            d_date)
SELECT *
FROM
  (SELECT item_sk,
          d_date,
          web_sales,
          store_sales,
          max(web_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY item_sk
                               ORDER BY d_date ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) web_cumulative,
                              max(store_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY item_sk
                                                     ORDER BY d_date ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) store_cumulative
   FROM
     (SELECT CASE
                 WHEN web.item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web.item_sk
                 ELSE store.item_sk
             END item_sk,
             CASE
                 WHEN web.d_date IS NOT NULL THEN web.d_date
                 ELSE store.d_date
             END d_date,
             web.cume_sales web_sales,
             store.cume_sales store_sales
      FROM web_v1 web
      FULL OUTER JOIN store_v1 store ON (web.item_sk = store.item_sk
                                         AND web.d_date = store.d_date))x)y
WHERE web_cumulative > store_cumulative
ORDER BY item_sk NULLS FIRST,
         d_date NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100;

Projections: max(web_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY item_sk ORDER BY d_date ASC NULLS LAST ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
max(store_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY item_sk ORDER BY d_date ASC NULLS LAST ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

extra_info.Projections: sum(sum(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_item_sk ORDER BY d_date ASC NULLS LAST ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
sum(sum(ws_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ws_item_sk ORDER BY d_date ASC NULLS LAST ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
